phases.label: SciPy Basics
phases.description: Optimization, integration, interpolation, and signal processing.

topics.label: Optimization
topics.description: scipy.optimize.minimize, curve_fit, root. Find minima and fit curves.

topics.label: Integration
topics.description: scipy.integrate.quad, dblquad, odeint. Numerical integration and ODEs.

topics.label: Interpolation
topics.description: scipy.interpolate.interp1d, CubicSpline. Smooth data between points.

topics.label: Linear Algebra
topics.description: scipy.linalg for decompositions, solvers, and matrix functions.

topics.label: Signal Processing
topics.description: scipy.signal for filtering, FFT, and spectral analysis.

topics.label: Statistics
topics.description: scipy.stats for distributions, hypothesis tests, and descriptive stats.
